title: Uploading Files to a Form from Google/Google File Stream App
excerpt: When uploading docs to a form, how to can someone upload a google doc?  Using the Google Drive/File Stream app doesn’t allow uploads via forms. Anyone have any ideas or workarounds for this?  We have a board and need to …

posts.author: JSDixon (Scott Dixon )
posts.cookedHtml: When uploading docs to a form, how to can someone upload a google doc? Using the Google Drive/File Stream app doesn’t allow uploads via forms. Anyone have any ideas or workarounds for this? We have a board and need to capture the file being sent to via a form in Monday.
